# Step 5 — Instapaper Bookmarks Provider

> **Epic**: E1.3.5 | **Task**: T1.3.5.2.1.2
> **Depends on**: Step 3 (auth provider) + Step 4 (bookmarks endpoint)
> **Skills to load**: `riverpod-providers`, `flutter-managing-state`

Shared context: [E1.3.5 Instapaper Context](../instructions/e1.3.5-instapaper-context.instructions.md)

---

## Task

Create a Riverpod provider that fetches and exposes the user's Instapaper bookmark list. Auto-refreshes when auth state changes. Provides `refresh()` for pull-to-refresh.

---

## File to Create

### `lib/features/content/providers/instapaper_bookmarks_provider.dart`

```dart
import 'package:riverpod_annotation/riverpod_annotation.dart';
import 'package:speedy_boy/features/content/models/instapaper_bookmark.dart';
import 'package:speedy_boy/features/content/providers/instapaper_auth_provider.dart';

part 'instapaper_bookmarks_provider.g.dart';
```

#### Provider

```dart
/// Fetches and caches the user's Instapaper bookmarks.
///
/// Automatically invalidates when [instapaperAuthProvider] changes.
/// Returns an empty list when the user is not authenticated.
@riverpod
class InstapaperBookmarks extends _$InstapaperBookmarks {
  @override
  Future<List<InstapaperBookmark>> build() async {
    // Watch auth state — re-fetches when auth changes
    final authState = ref.watch(instapaperAuthProvider);

    if (authState is! InstapaperAuthAuthenticated) {
      return [];
    }

    final authNotifier = ref.read(instapaperAuthProvider.notifier);
    final client = authNotifier.client;
    if (client == null) return [];

    return client.getBookmarks(limit: 50);
  }

  /// Re-fetch bookmarks from API.
  ///
  /// Call on pull-to-refresh or after importing an article.
  Future<void> refresh() async {
    ref.invalidateSelf();
  }
}
```

### After creating the file

Run codegen:

```bash
dart run build_runner build --delete-conflicting-outputs
```

---

## Verification

```bash
dart analyze lib/features/content/providers/instapaper_bookmarks_provider.dart
dart run build_runner build --delete-conflicting-outputs
```

## Acceptance Criteria

- [ ] `@riverpod` annotated (auto-dispose when library screen leaves)
- [ ] Watches `instapaperAuthProvider` — re-fetches on auth state change
- [ ] Returns empty list when not authenticated
- [ ] Fetches via `InstapaperClient.getBookmarks()` when authenticated
- [ ] `refresh()` invalidates self to trigger re-fetch
- [ ] Default limit of 50 bookmarks
- [ ] `dart analyze` reports zero issues
- [ ] `.g.dart` generated successfully
- [ ] All public symbols have dartdoc comments
